payload.intent: Compile durable personal memory from the conversation transcript, preserving only stable facts.

memory_cards.statement: Sam said he left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Sam said he still listens to Bill Evans, though lately he has been listening more to early Coltrane.
Daniele and Sam agreed to catch up about AI infrastructure, and Sam asked Daniele to send him the article.

details: Captured Sam's job change from Goldman to Point72.
Captured Sam's music listening preference with reduced specificity on recency.
Captured the AI infra follow-up and article request as a pending task.

repair_options: If needed, split the music preference into two separate cards: long-term Bill Evans listening and recent shift toward early Coltrane.
If later context clarifies whether 'the article' is specific, update the follow-up card with the article topic or title.
